title: Connector/J 8 stmt setQueryTimeout can not work
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `test_002` (`id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`id`));
CREATE TABLE `test_003` (`user_id` INT, `score` FLOAT, `status` ENUM('active', 'inactive') DEFAULT 'active');
SELECT * FROM `test_002` WHERE id IN (SELECT user_id FROM `test_003` WHERE score IS NULL);
